title: Cinematic 3D Promotional Travel Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic magical-realism library portrait built around adult storybook tailor-artist with calm concentrated eyes, seated at the desk while guiding a miniature self-portrait figure, tiny miniature self-portrait figure posed like a delicate living doll on the desk, midnight-blue velvet gown with tiny embroidered stars and a faint magical shimmer, and old reading room with carved wooden shelves, leather-bound books, and antique desk lamps. Subject: adult storybook tailor-artist with calm concentrated eyes, seated at the desk while guiding a miniature self-portrait figure carefully holds and positions tiny miniature self-portrait figure posed like a delicate living doll on the desk; the miniature wears midnight-blue velvet gown with tiny embroidered stars and a faint magical shimmer and reads as a delicate tiny version of the full-sized subject. Scene: old reading room with carved wooden shelves, leather-bound books, and antique desk lamps creates the cozy vintage environment, with aged books, antique wood, warm wall sconces, and shallow background depth. Composition: Fixed cinematic desk portrait: full-sized subject seated behind the antique desk, hands gently shaping or guiding the tiny tabletop figure, miniature placed clearly in the foreground-middle, face readable, tailoring tools arranged around the scene, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Tiny self-portrait figure on the tabletop, full-sized subject shaping the miniature, antique library desk, tailoring tools, warm sconces, aged books, glowing particles, and intimate magical-realism mood. Source anchor: meigen featured archive anchor B1188D. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic magical realism with lifelike portrait texture, 8K detail, cozy vintage-library atmosphere, delicate scale illusion, and high-end storybook editorial polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber library glow, aged book browns, antique wood tones, soft skin tones, emerald or jewel-toned miniature dress accents, and tiny golden particle highlights. Lighting: Warm amber light from antique wall sconces, soft natural shadows, gentle highlights on face and hands, and a subtle magical shimmer around the miniature figure. Camera: Cinematic portrait framing with shallow depth of field, desk-level perspective, sharp focus on hands, face, miniature figure, and key tailoring props. Materials: tiny pattern papers, embroidery hoops, thread cards, scissors, and folded velvet scraps remain visible with aged paper, wood grain, fabric texture, thread, metal scissors, miniature dress fabric, and glowing particle detail. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Magical Realism Portrait 4 Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic magical-realism library portrait built around adult woman with focused tender expression, seated at the desk as if shaping a tiny living version of herself, tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop, graceful flowing emerald-green gown with intricate fabric details and soft glowing particles, and antique wooden desk inside a vintage library lined with aged books. Subject: adult woman with focused tender expression, seated at the desk as if shaping a tiny living version of herself carefully holds and positions tiny miniature version of the same woman standing on the tabletop; the miniature wears graceful flowing emerald-green gown with intricate fabric details and soft glowing particles and reads as a delicate tiny version of the full-sized subject. Scene: antique wooden desk inside a vintage library lined with aged books creates the cozy vintage environment, with aged books, antique wood, warm wall sconces, and shallow background depth. Composition: Fixed cinematic desk portrait: full-sized subject seated behind the antique desk, hands gently shaping or guiding the tiny tabletop figure, miniature placed clearly in the foreground-middle, face readable, tailoring tools arranged around the scene, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Tiny self-portrait figure on the tabletop, full-sized subject shaping the miniature, antique library desk, tailoring tools, warm sconces, aged books, glowing particles, and intimate magical-realism mood. Source anchor: meigen featured archive anchor B1188D. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic magical realism with lifelike portrait texture, 8K detail, cozy vintage-library atmosphere, delicate scale illusion, and high-end storybook editorial polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber library glow, aged book browns, antique wood tones, soft skin tones, emerald or jewel-toned miniature dress accents, and tiny golden particle highlights. Lighting: Warm amber light from antique wall sconces, soft natural shadows, gentle highlights on face and hands, and a subtle magical shimmer around the miniature figure. Camera: Cinematic portrait framing with shallow depth of field, desk-level perspective, sharp focus on hands, face, miniature figure, and key tailoring props. Materials: tailoring scissors, thread spools, measuring tape, small fabric swatches, and brass pins remain visible with aged paper, wood grain, fabric texture, thread, metal scissors, miniature dress fabric, and glowing particle detail. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
